name: Mustard Chicken with Sun Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup sun-dried tomatoes, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add the chicken to the pan and cook on both sides until lightly browned, about 3-4 minutes per side.
3. Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
4. In the same pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
5. Add the shallots, garlic, mustard, and sun-dried tomatoes to the pan. Stir frequently until the shallots are soft and fragrant, about 5 minutes.
6. Return the chicken to the pan and cover with a lid.
7. Cook, covered, for about 10 minutes, or until the chicken is tender and reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (75°C).
8. Remove from heat and serve immediately.
